sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n80703" key="pentaplasiepi/pemptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πενταπλᾰσι-επίπεμπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n80703.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">five and</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl>/<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0358.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">times as large</tr_> :</sense> </entryFree>
